query:
INSERT INTO agent_tool_jobs (
                id, provider, status, prompt, context_paths, output_profile,
                environment, metadata, created_at, updated_at,
                operator_id, user_id, platform_id,
                result, error_message, resume_session_id,
                assigned_worker_id
            ) VALUES (
                ?, ?, ?, ?, ?, ?,
                ?, ?, ?, ?,
                ?, ?, ?,
                ?, ?, ?,
                ?
            )
            ON DUPLICATE KEY UPDATE
                provider = VALUES(provider),
                status = VALUES(status),
                prompt = VALUES(prompt),
                context_paths = VALUES(context_paths),
                output_profile = VALUES(output_profile),
                environment = VALUES(environment),
                metadata = VALUES(metadata),
                updated_at = VALUES(updated_at),
                operator_id = VALUES(operator_id),
                user_id = VALUES(user_id),
                platform_id = VALUES(platform_id),
                result = VALUES(result),
                error_message = VALUES(error_message),
                resume_session_id = VALUES(resume_session_id),
                assigned_worker_id = VALUES(assigned_worker_id)
